title: Easy Fence Picket Wood Pumpkin Decor
summary: Layered cedar fence picket boards, glued with a slight overlap and jigsaw-cut into a pumpkin silhouette — buildable in a small or large size from the same two fence pickets.
description:
The layering technique is the same idea behind the catalog's other fence-picket pumpkin builds: glue several boards together with a slight overlap rather than edge to edge, which gives the finished cutout enough thickness to stand freely without a separate stand. The small and large versions use the same construction, just more layers and a bigger cut for the large one.

Freehand the pumpkin outline — the source is right that no two pumpkins look alike, so there's no wrong shape as long as it reads as a pumpkin. Staining or painting before attaching the stem support lets you get a clean two-tone look without masking anything off, since the stem support piece goes on the back where it won't show.

materials.name: Cedar fence picket, 5-1/2" wide, 72 in
materials.note: One picket makes the small pumpkin; a picket and a half makes the large one.

steps.title: Layer the fence picket boards
steps.body: Glue and nail (or staple) the fence picket pieces together with about a 1" overlap between each board — this overlap is what gives the finished shape enough thickness to stand on its own. For the larger pumpkin, add two additional layered pickets.

steps.title: Draw and cut the pumpkin shape
steps.body:
Freehand a pumpkin outline with a pencil — every pumpkin is a little different, so any reasonable shape works. Cut with a jigsaw and lightly sand any rough edges.

If you want a two-tone look, paint or stain the pumpkin now, before the stem support goes on, and finish the stem separately in a contrasting color if desired.

steps.title: Attach the stem support
steps.body: Glue and attach the stem support and backer piece to the back of the pumpkin. Nail or staple from the fence-picket side into the back of the support piece, positioning it so the pumpkin stays upright and stable.

images.alt: Layered cedar fence picket wood pumpkin decor
